case_title: CHEN XU MING VS CAPITAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT CO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT CO
